name: Appium
description: Install Appium, list devices, and run mobile UI test commands from OpenClaw agents.

serverUrl.description: Override Appium server base URL (default http://127.0.0.1:<serverPort>).

testWorkdir.description: Default working directory for appium_run commands.

defaultPlatform.description: Default mobile platform when a tool call omits platform.

appiumPath.description: Explicit Appium CLI path. When omitted, OpenClaw probes PATH.

adbPath.description: Explicit adb path for Android device checks.

autoStartServer.description: Start a local Appium server before appium_run when none is healthy.

runTimeoutSec.description: Default timeout for appium_run shell commands.

androidDriver.description: Android driver id installed by appium_setup (default uiautomator2).

iosDriver.description: iOS driver id installed by appium_setup (default xcuitest).

serverPort.label: Appium port
serverPort.help: Local Appium server port used for health checks and auto-start.

autoStartServer.label: Auto-start Appium
autoStartServer.help: Start Appium locally before running test commands when /status is unhealthy.
